nasb.text: then the congregation shall judge between the slayer and the blood avenger according to these ordinances.

esv.text: then the congregation shall judge between the manslayer and the avenger of blood, in accordance with these rules.

cnv.text: 這樣，會眾就要照著典章，在打死人的和報血仇的人中間施行裁判。

ccb.text: 会众就要照这些律例在误杀人者与复仇者之间做出判决。
